text: Two men race on their horses around a track.
A romantic couple sits close together on a park bench.
Three people with snowboards sit together in the snow.
Brown house cat curled up in a bowl on a dining room table.
Beer bottle on picnic table on beach with umbrellas and swimmer
Several clusters of bananas are fanned out in a fruit display.
Two zebras playing in the grassy pasture that's fenced in.
The black cat is sitting on the unmade bed.
a group of sheep resting in the meadow under a large shade tree
A stop sign that has been graffitied to say never stop loving.
